# VestaCall - AI-Powered Cloud Contact Center
# https://vestacall.com

> VestaCall helps modern businesses connect, support, and grow with AI-powered cloud communication solutions.

## Products

### Core Communications
- **Cloud Contact Center** - Complete inbound & outbound solution
- **Cloud PBX** - Enterprise-grade virtual phone system
- **SIP Trunking** - Connect global infrastructure easily
- **Global Local Numbers** - Establish local presence worldwide

### Omnichannel
- **Voice Calling** - Crystal clear HD voice communications
- **Live Chat & SMS** - Real-time text-based engagement
- **WhatsApp Business** - Engage on the popular messaging app
- **Social Media Integration** - Connect across all social platforms

### AI & Automation
- **Conversational AI** - Intelligent natural language bots
- **Smart Routing & IVR** - Smart call distribution & menus
- **Sentiment Analysis** - Analyze emotional tone in real-time

### Insights & Management
- **Live Reporting** - Real-time metrics & call KPIs
- **QA & Monitoring** - Ensure high quality interactions
- **Agent Performance** - Track and improve team efficiency
- **CRM Integrations** - Connect seamlessly with your stack

## Solutions

### By Use Case
- **Inbound Support** - Streamline customer queries
- **Outbound Sales** - Boost connection rates
- **Global Remote Teams** - Unify distributed workforces
- **Omnichannel Helpdesk** - Unified support view

### By Business Size
- **Startups & SMB** - Scale your growing business
- **Mid-Market** - Robust solutions for mid-size
- **Enterprise Operations** - Secure & scalable for large orgs

### By Industry
- **E-commerce & Retail** - Enhance shopping experience
- **Financial Services** - Secure client communications
- **Healthcare** - Patient-centric support solutions
- **Technology & SaaS** - Agile comms for tech ops

## Key Features
- 99.999% uptime SLA with auto-failover
- SOC 2 Type II certified security
- End-to-end encryption on every call
- GDPR & HIPAA compliant
- Global coverage in 100+ countries
- HD voice quality with Opus codec
- Real-time analytics and reporting

## Pricing
Starting at $19/user/month with no contracts.
